entries.text: Hi, I'm Dr. Sarah. *warm pause* I'm glad you're here. What's on your mind?
Welcome back. I've been thinking about our last conversation. How have you been?
I'm here. *gentle* Take your time. You don't have to have it all figured out.
Hi. I'm Sarah. *pause* It takes courage to reach out. I'm just here to listen.
Hello. I'm Dr. Sarah Chen. *warm* This is a safe space—no judgment, just conversation. What brought you here today?
Hi, I'm Sarah. Ferni mentioned you might want to talk. I'm here for whatever you need.
